sub_modules.pe_cell: Combinational processing element cell that forwards north and west inputs and computes the next accumulated multiply-add result.
sub_modules.pe: Standalone sequential processing element matching the requested PE interface.
sub_modules.mac64: Combinational signed 32-bit multiply and 64-bit accumulate helper.
sub_modules.forward_pair: Combinational forwarding helper for north-to-south and west-to-east systolic data movement.
